title: Can I integrate WorkForms with stripe?
excerpt: I would like to use WorkForms as an event booking form? Can I integrate Stripe with Forms?

posts.author: ritascl (Rita Luis)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to use WorkForms as an event booking form? Can I integrate Stripe with Forms?

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Rita!

In order to give you a more thorough answer, we’ll need to know a little bit more about the flow you envision for this integration.

Are you wanting form submissions to create Stripe charges? If so, this is not possible but you can use our Stripe integration to create items in a board and also connect a WorkForms form to the same board.

I’d love to have a better idea of the process you’re looking to achieve so we can find a workaround! Let me know what you think!

posts.author: ritascl (Rita Luis)
posts.cookedHtml: So clients would access the form fill the details and pay directly through it with Stripe that would be the aim

posts.author: JHconsultancy (Joseph Honig)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Rita,

You can use the Jotform-Stripe intergatiion and when the form is submitted you can use the Jotfom-monday.com intergation see screenshot attached.

image1812×867 59.1 KB

posts.author: Nir-Jetpack (Nir @ Jetpack Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
I suggest you to check out monday stripe integration on GetSign. Once you connect your stipe account to monday with getsign you can perform this workflow - 1. User completes a workform submission 2. User get and email with payment request 3. User pay using stripe the amount that is taken automatically from the board item 4. Board/ item is updated automatically - status is changed to paid and transaction ID is added.

Learn more below

GetSign

Collect payment with Stripe - GetSign

Enables recipients to make payments as they sign.
